title: Dungeon defense
description: A mod that lets players make and fight dungeons!
body: Dungeon defense is a highly survival friendly complex mod, it adds many new mechanics and items to the game. The main goal of Dungeon defense is to let players build dungeons and for other players to explore them for loot. Along with the many technology parts of this mod, you get several monsters and traps to put in your dungeon, such as, Spike trap, flamethrower, fragile bricks, boulder, sawblade launcher and much more! You can use souls to power many machines in this mod such as the LOOT FUNNELER! the loot funeler once powered with souls and linked with a chest. will fill that chest with dungeon loot forever until it runs out of souls, making your dungeon infinitely repetable, and infinitely fun! there are many more things that Will be explained in the video linked here: https://youtu.be/Did2jmcJ8jk
